0.text: Emphysematous changes in the apical segments of both lungs

1.text: Subpleural focal cystic emphysematous change at the level of the lateral lingular segment of the left lung

2.text: Solid pulmonary nodules in both lungs, largest measuring approximately 6 mm in diameter in the anterior upper lobe of the right lung

3.text: Small area of ground glass opacity in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

4.text: Scattered, small-sized faint ground glass opacities in the right lung
